MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Present: Arnold W. Evje, Esq., appearing for the plaintiff and Karen Chavez, defendant, appearing in pro per. The case settled per stipulation of parties, not reported. Trial date is vacated.
